title: rsac is the ground-truth capture API; downstreams adapt to it
rationale: rsac is a cross-platform audio CAPTURE library (system/device/app/process-tree; WASAPI/PipeWire/CoreAudio; rtrb SPSC bridge). GOAL: design the BEST-possible, most performant + feature-rich capture API (helpers, macros, types) — rsac DEFINES the UX that downstreams consume; it is NOT retrofitted to any one consumer. audio-graph (../audio-graph) is one EXAMPLE consumer whose pain points are EVIDENCE of missing affordances, not a spec. Scope stays capture-only per VISION.md (no DSP/mixing/encoding). RT callback thread NEVER alloc/lock/block. Module DAG core->bridge->audio->api. Verify tiers: Windows-native, WSL (feat_linux), Go (rsac-ffi staticlib), macOS via GH Actions CI. Commits: no Co-Authored-By/byline. Every non-fixed review comment -> tracking issue.

name: verification toolchain + os-eco coordination
description: How to verify changes across platforms and coordinate workflows via seeds/mulch
